ZW WOMAN COLLECTION

Long biker coat made of faux leather fabric with tonal faux shearling interior. Lapel collar and long sleeves with turned-up cuffs. Pocket with side zipper. Front closure with double positioned metal zipper. 

The characteristics of the timeless biker jacket take on a new dimension in this coat. Side pockets and a double positioned front zipper closure are incorporated in this new interpretation of this double faced coat.
